description: Wizard-distributed machine-readable contract for the typed emission plan. The generator validates the emission inputs into a typed, self-contained plan before emitting any files; downstream emitters read only the plan, never any build-side source. Shape-specific adaptation is handled by per-shape template-variant selection, not by logic in the generator. Authority-profile-gated content is emitted under a provisional default profile that is machine-visible and fail-closed until an operator authority profile becomes available. This JSON is the machine-readable instance; the canonical prose specification lives outside the wizard distribution (build-side documentation, not in this artifact).
invariants: I1: all required_top_level_fields are present and correctly typed
I2: authority_profile.posture is a member of enums.authority_posture

I3: every corpus_cell with authority_gate != 'applies-all' has authority_basis == 'provisional_default' AND authority_source in {delegated, wizard-default, hard-control, operator-configured}; every corpus_cell with authority_gate == 'applies-all' has authority_basis == 'not_applicable' AND authority_source == 'not_applicable'
I5: every enum-valued field resolves to its closed-set member (fail-closed on unknown value)
I6: agent and orchestrator model-tier references are tier keys (high/standard/fast), never literal model strings; model_tiers keys are valid tier keys and values are non-empty resolved model strings
I7: if foundation_only_mode == true, agents is empty (no implementation layer emitted)

I8: every corpus_cell with source_type == 'template_variant' has a matching template_variants entry for its (cell_id, system_shape); every corpus_cell with source_type == 'inline_payload' has a non-empty payload
I9: every control_plane path and every agent.output_directory is covered by an emitted_files entry OR is declared runtime-created in control_plane_runtime_created
I10: every tier key referenced by the orchestrator (model_tier_high/standard/fast) or any agent (primary_model_tier/status_model_tier) is present as a key in model_tiers
